title: Apple Corer - Fruit Core Remover Stainless Steel Apple Pear Seed Corers Remover Tool Multi Function Fruit Corers Easy Twist Core Seed Remover for a Variety of Fruits for Home and Kitchen
features: Sturdy Material: Each corer is made of stainless steel, stable and durable to use, not easy to rust, deform or break, convenient to wash and clean, support for long time using.
Comfortable Grips: Our stainless steel fruit pitter tool possesses a handle which is reasonable for holding, operating, hanging and storing.

Easy To Use: Designed with a 2 cm / 0.79 inch serrated blade which is easy for inserting the fruit, you can rotate or push the corer through your fruit effortlessly, the open process slot can help you simply remove the fruit core, bring convenience to your cooking and baking.Sharp Blade cuts close to the fruits core for minimal waste.
Ergonomic Design: The handle of this fruit corer adopts an ergonomic design, easy to hold and provides a comfortable grip , anti-slipping and will not hurt your hands.

Wide Application: The fruit core seed remover is widely used, not only can be used as apple corer, but also can be used as pear, cherry, jujube, red dates and so on. It's easy to carry and suitable for picnic, hiking, traveling, camping, home use, etc.
